# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This workspace contains a front-end prototype for an Architect Engineer Platform.

Keep updates focused on:
- Dashboard and executive summary UI
- Project management cards and progress views
- Task board and workflow status
- Saudi Building Code compliance checklist
- Budget tracker and analytics overview
- Team overview and report previews

The current implementation is static HTML/CSS/JavaScript, with future enhancements expected to add React, server APIs, Excel/XLSX integration, and file processing.
